summary: Authored P1 deliverable SRS.md (496 lines) with all 9 required sections, 8 immutable FRs (FR-01..FR-08) each carrying multiple testable/measurable acceptance criteria, verbatim reproduction of SPEC §11 constraints, §8 errors, §9 risks, §10 acceptance, 151 SPEC.md line citations, and zero TODO/TBD placeholders.
